summary: Website project with responsive design for mobile and PC
architectural_notes: Responsive design required for mobile and desktop viewports

existing_features.title: Update Navigation component to ensure mobile menu is fully functional with proper touch interactions and responsive breakpoints
Optimize HeroSection for mobile devices with responsive text sizing, button layout, and 3D sphere performance
Ensure ServicesSection grid adapts responsively from single column on mobile to multi-column layout on tablet and desktop
Make PricingSection pricing cards responsive with proper stacking on mobile and grid layout on desktop
Optimize ProductShowcase mockup cards for mobile viewing with appropriate image sizing and touch interactions
Ensure ProjectCalculator form is mobile-friendly with responsive inputs, checkboxes, and button sizing
Make ContactSection form and contact info cards responsive with proper mobile layout
Optimize TechnologyStack grid and animated connections for mobile devices with reduced animation complexity if needed for performance
Ensure WhatsAppButton remains accessible and properly positioned on mobile devices with appropriate sizing for thumb interaction
Verify AboutFounder section displays responsively with proper image and text layout on mobile and desktop
Test and optimize all canvas-based animations (ParticleField, AnimatedBackground, AnimatedConnections) for mobile performance and battery efficiency

new_feature_requests.summary: Make website responsive for both mobile and PC

projectName: Make website fully responsive for mobile and desktop
